titleStmt.title: SII 18.202: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 202. (B.K. No. 119 of 1933-34.) ARJUNAGI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Hanumantadēva temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Siṁgaṇadeva ruling from Dēvagiri is dated in Śaka 11[30], Prabhava, Thursday, lunar eclipse. The month and the tithi are lost. The Śaka year cited is the current year. In the cyclic year Prabhava, coinciding with A.D. 1207 there were two lunar eclipses and the one which occurred on Thursday was on S11rāvaṇa Pūrnimā corresponding to August 9.

It states that when a subordinate (name lost) of the king was governing Taddavaḍi One-thousand, Muddarasa, [Kū]charasa and others of Arjunige situated in Bāge Fifty made a grant of land, house site and oil mill for worship and offerings to god Svayambhu-Mallikārjunadēva. The record is very badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
pratāpacakravartti siṁgaṇadēvaru dēvagiriya nele
khasaṁkathā[vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire .] tatpādapadmōpa jīvi śrīma
taddavāḍisāyiramanāḷuttamire
1130 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada brihaspativāra sō
magrahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu bāge Ayyattaṟoḷagaṇa Arjjunigeya mahā
prabhu muddarasa kūcarasaṁgaḷuṁ mūliga boppagāvuṁḍanuṁ Eṁṭu
hiṭṭugaḷuṁ sthānamānyakāṟaruṁ mēlāḷikeya ma Iṁtinibaruṁ taṁ
moḷage Aikamatyavāgi kuḷḷirddu gaṇa rada śrīsvayaṁbhumallikā
rjjunadēvara sthānadācāryya gurugaḷa
yyanu Ā mallikārjjunadēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgapūje
ge khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakeṁdu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi ligeya
Aḍḍadāriyiṁ mūḍalu bāgeya sīmeyiṁ
māṇikēśvarada kōlulu
ttaru keyyuyyumaṁ perbbaṭṭeya
ttaru 13 keyya Agala 24 keyya nīḷada mane naṁdādīvigegoṁdu gāṇa Iṁti
nisuvaṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi haḍadu koṭṭaru [I]dharmmavaṁ prajegaḷuṁ mū
ligaṭhuṁ Eṁṭu hiṭṭuṁ sthānamānyakāṟaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru .
bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādhibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā
bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . gāmēkāṁ ratnikāmēkāṁ bhūmērapyarddha
maṁgulaṁ haraṁnarakamāpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁplavaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
